ground_truth.description: Photo of Burleigh Beach on Gold Coast, Australia. Buildings in background and Burleigh Heads visible. Rainbow barely visible.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Photo of Burleigh Beach on the Gold Coast in Australia. It has some buildings in the background and the Burleigh Heads, but no other visible landmarks. There is also a rainbow barely visible. It should be able to recognize the beach or at least «an Australian beach» or the Gold Coast without metadata, and should be spot on with metadata (but may confuse it with Miami Beach as that is right next to it). Daytime, somewhat cloudy, rainbow.

details.description: Wide sandy surf beach on Australia’s Gold Coast looking south toward a prominent vegetated headland with rocky slopes. Small-to-moderate waves roll in from the left; wet sand reflects light in the foreground with surf-safety flags/markers set along the shore. At the base of the headland are several modern high‑rise apartment buildings forming the Burleigh Heads beachfront skyline. Coastal dunes and pines line the right edge. A faint rainbow arcs over the coastline beneath broken grey clouds. The vantage appears slightly elevated, consistent with the North Burleigh/Mick Schamburg Park lookout area at Miami, looking toward Burleigh Head and Burleigh Beach.

details.description: A broad sandy Gold Coast beach with turquoise waves rolling in and a tree-covered headland to the left. A cluster of white mid-rise apartment buildings lines the beachfront along the coast. The sky is mostly cloudy with a hint of blue, and a rainbow arcs across the sea toward the buildings, adding a colorful focal point. The water near the shore shows white foam as the waves break, and the beach has minimal human activity with small markers or flags visible. The vantage appears to be from a promenade or park along Miami Beach in the Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia, facing northeast toward the coastline where high-rise development meets the ocean.

details.description: A scenic coastal view looking south along a wide expanse of sandy beach towards a prominent, forest-covered headland rising from the ocean. The sea on the left is choppy with white-capped waves rolling towards the shore. A cluster of white high-rise apartment buildings lines the beachfront at the base of the distant hill. A distinct rainbow arcs through the overcast, grey sky on the right side, descending towards the hinterland. The foreground consists of a broad stretch of beach with a few distant figures walking on the sand.

details.description: A high-angle coastal landscape photograph taken from an elevated lookout, looking south along a wide, sandy beach towards a prominent, tree-covered headland. The beach features turquoise water with rolling white waves. Several high-rise apartment buildings are clustered along the shoreline at the base of the headland. A faint rainbow arcs across the sky, which is filled with heavy, grey clouds. The foreground shows the expansive sandy shore with a few beach flags and distant figures. The headland in the background is Burleigh Head, a well-known landmark on the Gold Coast.

details.description: Wide sandy surf beach on Australia’s Gold Coast under an overcast sky with a faint rainbow at right. Low tide exposes wet sand and a gentle shorebreak with several sets of white-capped waves. Surf lifesaving flags and markers line the beach. In the distance a densely vegetated headland juts into the sea, with clusters of mid‑rise beachfront apartments at its base—characteristic of Burleigh Heads. The viewpoint appears to be from the North Burleigh/Mick Schamburg Park area in Miami, looking south toward Burleigh Head and the Burleigh Heads beachfront.

A green, tree-covered headland extends into the water from the left. A rainbow arcs across the horizon above the sea, while the sky is partly cloudy with patches of blue. details.description: Coastal scene on Australia’s Gold Coast showing a broad sandy beach with small surf, several surf‑lifesaving swimming flags along the shoreline, and a low, forested headland projecting into the sea. Behind and just inland of the headland is a cluster of modern white and light‑grey high‑rise apartment towers typical of Burleigh Heads. A faint rainbow arcs in the sky to the right under broken, overcast clouds. The view suggests the Burleigh Headland with the Burleigh Heads beachfront skyline beyond.

details.description: A broad view of a tropical Gold Coast beach. The sandy shoreline runs along the turquoise sea with gentle waves breaking near the shore. A prominent green headland or hill rises to the left, dotted with trees. In front of it, a cluster of white, modern high-rise apartment buildings lines the beachfront. The sky is partly cloudy with a vivid rainbow arcing across the horizon above the cityscape, adding a splash of color to the scene. A few beach markers and a small object (resembling a dinghy or surf equipment) rest on the sand near the waterline.

details.description: A scenic coastal view looking south along a wide, sandy beach towards a prominent, vegetation-covered headland. The Pacific Ocean is on the left, featuring rolling white waves and a turquoise hue near the shore. In the distance, the headland (Burleigh Head) rises steeply from the sea, covered in dense green forest. At the base of the hill and stretching along the coastline, a cluster of white high-rise apartment buildings and hotels forms a distinctive skyline. The sky is overcast with grey, moody clouds, and a faint rainbow arches down on the right side of the image, framing the urban area. The foreground consists of a vast expanse of wet and dry sand, with a few small figures visible in the distance.

details.description: A vertical photograph capturing a wide sandy beach on a cloudy day. In the background, a prominent, lush green headland meets the ocean. Clustered at the base of this hill and along the shoreline are several white high-rise apartment buildings. A faint but distinct rainbow arcs across the sky above the buildings. The ocean displays turquoise water with multiple rows of white-capped waves breaking towards the shore. On the sand, red and yellow surf lifesaving flags are visible, along with a few distant figures. The overall lighting is soft and even, characteristic of an overcast day.

details.description: A wide, empty surf beach with pale sand and small, even shore‑breaks rolling in from a green‑blue ocean. A forested headland projects into the sea at the far left, with a cluster of mid‑ to high‑rise white apartment towers lining the shoreline at its base. The beach is marked with red‑and‑yellow lifesaving flags and safety signs. Dune vegetation and a line of trees run behind the sand to the right. The sky is mostly overcast, and a faint rainbow arcs over the right side of the scene. The setting suggests an urban Australian east‑coast surf beach, likely on the Gold Coast.
